bio: Rohit brings over 15 years of deep psychological mapping and career pathing experience. Having worked closely with Ivy League alumni boards, his guidance is hyper-tailored to realistic and modern pathways.
missionStatement: We fundamentally believe that no student exists without a core genius. It is our duty to locate it, refine it, and map it perfectly to the modern world.

timeline.title: Founded Newstep
timeline.description: Started with a vision to map true potential.

timeline.title: Expanded Nationally
timeline.description: Began testing over 5,000 students via psychometrics.
